# ++CHRCH Access

*Section: THE BOOK OF INFLUENCE: Make Art Not Content*

- id: 36457991
- url: https://learn.makeartnotcontent.com/courses/465756/lectures/36457991

- `iframe` https://js.stripe.com/v3/controller-with-preconnect-5923ab14c9a2faa0ad2f0f95c16ea979.html#__shared_params__[version]=v3&__shared_params__[light_experiment_assignments]=%7B%22token%22%3A%221431ee61-1383-4f3a-b3ed-8d54d3089033%22%2C%22assignments%22%3A%7B%22link_ewcs_prewarm_experiment_v2%22%3A%22treatment%22%7D%7D&apiKey=pk_live_hkgvgSBxG4TAl3zGlXiB1KUX&stripeJsId=1431ee61-1383-4f3a-b3ed-8d54d3089033&stripeObjId=sobj-7a800b7b-b597-4dc3-9352-c12174f0b574&firstStripeInstanceCreatedLatency=1467&controllerCount=1&isCheckout=false&stripeJsLoadTime=1778072697030&manualBrowserDeprecationRollout=false&mids[guid]=a076704f-372f-48f5-a7ba-779f62528850324a2d&mids[muid]=53e126fd-04c3-48c6-890f-b04f0b26f45c352beb&mids[sid]=fdbd9602-a5fb-4729-889c-fc318f4a977cddf210&referrer=https%3A%2F%2Flearn.makeartnotcontent.com%2Fcourses%2F465756%2Flectures%2F36457991&controllerId=__privateStripeController2021

---

##    8\. Killer Email Newsletters To Inspire You (For Your Own) 

When you're REALLY creative, you're creative with EVERYTHING you touch.

Especially in the way you communicate with your fans.

You make every part of life another aspect of your art.

Here's a list of people who have decided that living an artistic life means NEVER running through the motions.

They've made email their bitch.

Follow them. You can always unsubscribe if it's not your thing.

But I bet you you won't...

  


## Leftzets Letter - Music Business

<https://lefsetz.com/wordpress/>

3 emails a week about the music industry from a music lawyer. Everyone who is anyone in the industry is subscribed to it. Artists, producers and labels. 

  


## Drawing Links - Illustration

<https://substack.com/@drawinglinks>

Edith realized at some point that emails would be a great way of sharing her daily cartoons.

  


## Austin Kleon - Inspire Artists

<https://austinkleon.com/newsletter/>

The guy who wrote the book 'Steal Like An Artist' has a newsletter. Do I need to say more?

  


## **Lorde - Musician**

<https://www.lorde.co.nz/sign-up>

So poetic. Proof that when you're creative, it spills into everything. When she's promoting something, I don't even notice.

  


  


# **KILLER MYSTERY SCHOOL ⭐️ STUDENT EMAIL NEWSLETTERS (They're all great, that's why I'm sending you there. This is not a charity.)**

  


# **TOP 5**

  


## 1\. Karima Hassan - Painting

<https://www.karimahhassan.com/>

Karimah is taking her community of "gremlins" along for a ride where she questions everything and brings home a new truth every Sunday.

  


## 2\. Lauren Klein - Illustration / Writing

[https://www.fruitstains.com/](https://www.fruitstains.com)

Lauren has made illustration and writing become one. By combining these art forms, she has created a neurotic, off-kilter experience. These emails will give you solace knowing that at least someone out there is more fucked up than you are.

  


## 3\. Burr Capsule - Fashion

<https://mailchi.mp/3f6965bb17c5/burr-capsule>

Burak attempts to break "email newsletters" every week. It's a punk rock mirror to what he's lining up to do in the fashion world.

  


## 4\. Alienbroadcast Transmissions - Analog Collage

<https://hannahhaddix.kit.com/yeshello>

Not for the faint of heart. If you're easily offended, stay away. (Or maybe Hannah's world is exactly what you need to help wake you up from your people-pleasing normie default state.)

  


## 5\. Sizzy Rocket - Musician

<https://www.sizzyrocket.com/>

The underdogs needed a voice. Now they have it. ⚡️⚡️  


  


## If you have your own "newsletter" (or you're planning to start one), email me to get my special 'ART OF EMAIL' secrets.

  


[ Complete and Continue   ]()

![Zach Cohan](https://s.gravatar.com/avatar/c2d9250fd643364855133bd765585ce2?d=mm&s=70)

Zach Cohan

Awaiting Review 

4 years ago 

[ __ Reply  ](javascript:void\(0\))[ __ Link  ](https://learn.makeartnotcontent.com/courses/465756/lectures/36457991/comments/16973820)

Super anxious and excited to dive in. Email makes so much sense practically but as it is new, it does scare me a bit. I overthink the "right way to do it" sometimes. I want to make sure I am providing value and not just making a list that I can sell to. I intend to share things I have found to be valuable to me throughout the week as well as offer direct access to my posts/music/etc that might have been missed due to the massive amount of content out there. Zachscohan.com if you're interested!

You overthink because you love reading (inputs). The more action (outputs) you do, the less overthinking will be an issue for you.
